notes: Fortunes (slice 2) — the hunt. Faint 📡 Signals now appear near worlds you know: anomalous readings, drifting caches, derelict hulks, encrypted chatter, distress beacons. Fly to one and 🔍 Investigate it (an action + fuel) for a rarity-weighted roll — a Fortune (boon or bane), salvage (credits/tech/cargo), or a dead end. Signals come in faint/strong/rare tiers: rarer ones pay better and grant longer-lasting effects but fade faster and cost more fuel. They turn up from exploring new worlds, sweeping the lanes, and plain luck — and decay if you ignore them, so chase the ones worth the burn. Active signals show under your Ship stats.
